data.title: Mark Cuban Dismisses Polymarket Election Odds As Meaningless: 'Most Of The Money Is Foreign'
data.description: Billionaire Mark Cuban doubts Polymarket's election odds, citing foreign money and legality issues. He also eyes role as SEC Chair to support crypto growth.

data.title: JAB Strengthens Hold On Coffee Company JDE Peet's As Mondelez Sells Off 86M Shares
data.description: Mondelez International agreed to sell 86 million JDE Peet's shares to JAB for €25.10 per share. JAB also distributed shares to 70 limited partners, increasing free float to 32%.

data.title: GitLab Sees Surge in 'Ultimate' Adoption and Enterprise Demand, Analyst Upgrades Stock
data.description: GitLab (GTLB) stock gains after Needham analyst upgrades to Buy with $70 price target. Expecting increased Ultimate adoption and revenue growth.

data.title: Dave Ramsey Tells Mark Cuban Regardless Of Socio-Economic Status, 'You Have To Teach Kids To Work'
Robinhood's New Index Options & Futures Could Boost Market Share, Analyst Says
data.description: Piper Sandler analyst maintains Overweight rating, raises price target to $30 for Robinhood. New products may attract active traders.
